youtube.title: YouTube Video
youtube.description: Embed a YouTube video for your event
youtube.helpButtonTitle: Learn how to get YouTube embed link
youtube.inputPlaceholder: Paste YouTube embed code or URL here

helpModal.title: How to Get YouTube Embed Link
helpModal.intro: Follow these simple steps to embed a YouTube video:
helpModal.step1Desc: Open the YouTube video you want to embed in your browser.
helpModal.step2Desc: Under the video player, click the "Share" button.
helpModal.step3Desc: In the share dialog, click the "Embed" option.
helpModal.step4Desc: Copy the entire <iframe> code that appears, or just copy the URL from the src="" attribute.
helpModal.step5Desc: Paste either the full iframe code or just the URL into the input field above. Our system will automatically extract the correct embed URL.
helpModal.exampleHint: The embed URL should look like:

errors.updateNetworkError: Network error while updating embed links
errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid YouTube embed URL (https://www.youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID)

header.title: Payment Methods
header.subtitle: Add payment options for gifts, donations, and sponsorships
header.lockedDescription: Payment methods are currently locked. Only administrators can unlock to make changes.

lockError.title: Permission Denied
lockError.description: Only administrators can unlock payment methods.
lockError.contact: Please contact an administrator if you need to make changes to payment methods.

error.loadNetworkError: Network error while loading payment methods

empty.title: No payment methods added
empty.description: Add payment options for gifts, donations, and sponsorships

helpModal.title: About the Lock Feature
helpModal.intro: Use the lock feature to prevent accidental changes to payment methods and maintain control over sensitive financial information.

whenLocked.item1: Collaborators cannot add, edit, or delete payment methods
whenLocked.item2: Payment methods remain visible to all with access
whenLocked.item3: Editing controls are disabled for non-administrators
whenLocked.item4: Only Platform administrators can unlock to make changes

bestPractices.item1: Lock payment methods before sharing event access with collaborators
bestPractices.item2: Review and finalize payment details before locking
bestPractices.item3: Keep locked during event to prevent unwanted modifications

lockConfirmModal.descriptionUnlock: Are you sure you want to unlock payment methods? This will allow collaborators to make changes.
lockConfirmModal.descriptionLock: Are you sure you want to lock payment methods? This will prevent collaborators from making changes.
lockConfirmModal.noteUnlock: Once unlocked, any collaborator with edit access can add, modify, or delete payment methods.
lockConfirmModal.noteLock: Once locked, only administrators will be able to unlock and make changes to payment methods.
